Title: Valid login shows welcome
Steps:
open /
enter "admin" into "Username"
enter "secret" into "Password"
click "Log in"
verify page shows "Welcome"

Title: Invalid login shows error
Steps:
open /
enter "admin" into "Username"
enter "wrongpass" into "Password"
click "Log in"
verify page shows "Invalid credentials"
